hero.title: Bringing Our Neighbourhoods to Life
hero.subtitle: Connecting local action and expertise to build thriving communities
hero.intro: Urban challenges today - from climate stress to fragmented services - require a different approach. NoTF brings together communities, organizations, and local actors to create lasting change at the neighbourhood level.

hero.title: About Neighbourhoods of the Future
hero.subtitle: An alliance for local action, treating neighbourhoods as sites of knowhow and collaborative change

teaser.title: An Alliance for Local Action
teaser.description: NoTF is an informal alliance that treats neighbourhoods as sites of knowhow and action. The Nudge Unit brings communities, organizations, and local actors together through shared infrastructure, enabling collaboration that creates lasting change at the neighbourhood level.

whatIsNoTF.title: The Alliance for Local Action
whatIsNoTF.subtitle: An unbranded alliance treating neighbourhoods as sites of knowhow and action
whatIsNoTF.description: Neighbourhoods of the Future (NoTF) is an informal, unbranded alliance that acts as enabling infrastructure. The Nudge Unit brings siloed actors together, lowering the cost of collaboration and making mutual value visible.

point1.title: Ideas Already Exist
point1.desc: Built on the principle that ideas for local action already exist. Communities know what they need.

point2.title: Enabling Infrastructure
point2.desc: The Nudge Unit provides the platform, tools, and connections that help actors find one another and work together.

point3.title: Reducing Friction
point3.desc: Making collaboration easier by connecting Asks (what you need) with Gives (what others can offer).

example.title: Example in Action
example.desc: A community wanted to improve waste segregation. We connected them with a CBO experienced in community engagement, a solution provider offering training materials, and a local government contact. Together, they launched a successful ward-level program.

principles.title: Our Core Principles
principles.subtitle: Values-driven collaboration, rooted in trust and local experimentation

alignment.title: Alignment, Not Uniformity
alignment.point1: Actors don't need to operate the same way to work together
alignment.point2: The Nudge Unit coordinates around shared intent, not identical methods
alignment.point3: Diverse actors can move in coordinated ways without being identical

placeSensitive.title: Place-Sensitive Design
placeSensitive.point1: Solutions evolve from local realities and community aspirations
placeSensitive.point2: Respond to what people value, struggle with, and hope for
placeSensitive.point3: Interventions are grounded in neighbourhood context

participation.title: Participation Over Provision
participation.point1: Begin with what people already know, care about, and contribute
participation.point2: Shift from 'delivering solutions' to creating space for local participation
participation.point3: Ask what people can offer, not just what they need

adaptable.title: Adaptable by Design
adaptable.point1: Deliberately loose structure encourages ongoing experimentation
adaptable.point2: Members have visibility into each other's efforts and learnings
adaptable.point3: Enables continuous adaptation and collective learning

infrastructure.title: Shared Infrastructure
infrastructure.subtitle: Collating tools, spaces, and expertise to make collaboration easier
infrastructure.intro: NoTF redefines infrastructure to include four key types that enable neighbourhood action:

physical.title: Physical
physical.examples: Local hubs, community venues, shared tools and equipment

knowledge.title: Knowledge
knowledge.examples: Toolkits, implementation playbooks, case studies, resource banks

financial.title: Financial
financial.examples: Small grants, pooled funds, shared budgeting resources

social.title: Social
social.examples: Trust networks, citizen groups, CBO connections, peer support

nudgeUnit.title: Nudge Unit
nudgeUnit.subtitle: Your First Point of Contact
nudgeUnit.intro: The Nudge Unit helps members build work that is neighbourhood-based, climate-related, and community-focused.

librarian.title: The "Librarian" of NoTF
librarian.desc: Curates and connects you with everything you need—directories, toolkits, venues, pooled resources, and partner organizations.

matchmaking.title: Facilitating "Gives and Asks"
matchmaking.desc: The Unit's core role is matchmaking: Bring your Asks (what you need), get connected to Gives (what others can offer).

support.title: Member Support & Enablement
support.desc: Organizes member meetups, maintains a proposal bank, hosts help-desks in research, design, communications, and operations.

forCommunities.title: For Community Organizations
forCommunities.subtitle: Multiply your impact at the local level

momentum.title: Build Momentum
momentum.desc: Your participation helps generate momentum that spreads beyond a single project, creating ripple effects across the neighbourhood.

amplify.title: Amplify Local Impact
amplify.desc: When multiple projects come together in the same neighbourhood, they reinforce one another, making your impact deeper and more visible.

community.title: Join a Community of Practice
community.desc: Become part of a vibrant learning circle where implementers share experiences, troubleshoot challenges, and improve together.

validation.title: Gain Grounded Validation
validation.desc: Your work is seen, tested, and validated directly by residents and fellow practitioners, not just funders.

reduce.title: Reduce Duplication
reduce.desc: NoTF connects you with reliable partners already active in neighbourhoods, helping you avoid repeating efforts and wasting resources.

scale.title: See Your Ideas Adapt & Scale
scale.desc: See how your ideas are interpreted and applied across different neighbourhoods, allowing them to spread organically and effectively.

compound.title: Build Compounding Momentum
compound.desc: When multiple initiatives operate in the same place, even small contributions gain traction and compound over time.

knowledge.title: Access Shared Knowledge Base
knowledge.desc: Contribute to and benefit from a shared directory of tools, playbooks, case studies, and support infrastructure.

q1.question: What is NoTF?
q1.answer: Neighbourhoods of the Future is an unbranded, informal alliance that acts as a place-based platform and enabling infrastructure for collaboration. We treat neighbourhoods as the unit of change, bringing together communities, organizations, and local actors to create lasting impact.

q2.question: What does "place-based approach" mean?
q2.answer: It means the Nudge Unit treats neighbourhoods as active ecosystems of knowledge and action. The Nudge Unit aligns different actors' work based on local aspirations and needs, rather than bringing in siloed, outside-in solutions. Every neighbourhood is unique, and solutions must respond to local context.

q3.question: Which cities is NoTF active in?
q3.answer: The alliance is beginning in Bengaluru, Mumbai, Ahmedabad, and Bhubaneswar, with potential to expand. The Nudge Unit is building neighbourhood-level networks in each city, connecting communities and organizations working on climate, liveability, and social equity.

q4.question: What are "Gives and Asks"?
q4.answer: Gives are contributions like domain expertise, programs, physical spaces, CBO connections, or funding. Asks are needs like partners for implementation, tools, venues, small grants, or technical support. The Nudge Unit matches Asks with Gives to enable collaboration.

q5.question: What is the Nudge Unit?
q5.answer: The Nudge Unit is the first point of contact and the "cartilage" of NoTF. It helps connect members, collate resources, facilitate the matching of Asks and Offers, and provide ongoing support through meetups, help-desks, and a shared proposal bank.

executingPartners.title: Executing Partners
executingPartners.subtitle: Organizations implementing NoTF initiatives on the ground

join.title: Join the Movement
join.subtitle: Three simple steps to start transforming your neighbourhood

step1.title: 1. Register
step1.description: Submit your community or organization details through our simple form. We'll review within 3-5 days.

step2.title: 2. Connect
step2.description: Get matched with communities and organizations that align with your needs and offers.

step3.title: 3. Collaborate
step3.description: Build partnerships, share resources, and create lasting impact in your neighbourhood.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Neighbourhood?

chatbot.title: NOTF Assistant
chatbot.welcome: Welcome! How can I help you today?
chatbot.tips: Tips: You can switch modes anytime using the repeat button in the header. Resize this window by dragging the top-left corner.

common.loadingCitiesQuote: Great cities are not built by governments alone, but by communities working together.
